```{r}
#| label: fit ma models chunks
#| echo: false
knitr::read_chunk("../R/fit_models.R")
```

# Overall macroalgae analyses

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Define priors

```{r}
#| label: fit model 1 priors v3b
#| results: markup
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
#| cache: false
```

## Fit model

```{r}
#| label: fit model 1 fit v3b
#| results: markup
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
#| cache: false
```

## Explore

```{r}
#| label: fit model 1 explore v3b 
#| results: markup
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
```

![](../output/figures/model_1_priors_explore2_v3b.png){width="700px"}

## Traceplots

```{r}
#| label: MCMC diagnostics model 1 1 v3b 
#| results: markup
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
```

![](../output/figures/model_1_mcmc_diagnostics_1_v3b.png){width="700px"}

## Autocorrelation plots 

```{r}
#| label: MCMC diagnostics model 1 2 v3b 
#| results: markup
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
```

![](../output/figures/model_1_mcmc_diagnostics_2_v3b.png){width="700px"}

## Rhat

```{r}
#| label: MCMC diagnostics model 1 3 v3b 
#| results: markup
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
```

![](../output/figures/model_1_mcmc_diagnostics_3_v3b.png){width="700px"}

## Effective sample size

```{r}
#| label: MCMC diagnostics model 1 4 v3b 
#| results: markup
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
```

![](../output/figures/model_1_mcmc_diagnostics_4_v3b.png){width="700px"}

## Posterior predictive tests

```{r}
#| label: MCMC diagnostics model 1 5 v3b 
#| results: markup
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
```

![](../output/figures/model_1_mcmc_diagnostics_5_v3b.png){width="700px"}



:::
